glosses.ja: 気絶させる; ノックアウトする

translations.en: This price is knocking me out completely.
translations.es: Este precio me aturde por completo.
translations.de: Dieser Preis haut mich komplett um.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个价格把我完全打懵了。
translations.yue: 呢個價錢搞到我完全暈咗。
translations.pt: Este preço deixa-me completamente em choque.
translations.tr: Bu fiyat beni tamamen serseme çeviriyor.
translations.vi: Cái giá này làm tôi choáng váng hoàn toàn.
translations.nl: Deze prijs slaat me volledig omver.
translations.hi: यह कीमत मुझे पूरी तरह से स्तब्ध कर देती है.
translations.pl: Ta cena kompletnie mnie zwala z nóg.
translations.el: Αυτή η τιμή με ζαλίζει τελείως.
translations.nb: Denne prisen slår mig helt ut.
translations.id: Harga ini membuat saya benar-benar kaget.
translations.sv: Det här priset golvar mig helt.
translations.ro: Prețul ăsta mă dă complet peste cap.
translations.da: Den her pris slår mig fuldstændig ud.
translations.fi: Tämä hinta lyö minut aivan ällikällä.
translations.ja: この値段には完全に参った。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies the noun 'prix' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'prix'); transitive. The attached clitic 'm'' is the 1st person singular direct object pronoun (lemma: 'me').
Adverb of degree/manner intensifying the verb.

translations.en: The ball almost knocks him out.
translations.de: Der Ball haut ihn fast um.
translations.yue: 個波差啲就打到佢暈咗。
translations.pt: A bola quase o pôs fora de combate.
translations.he: הכדור כמעט הפיל אותו בלי הכרה.
translations.vi: Quả bóng suýt nữa làm anh ấy ngất.
translations.nl: De bal sloeg hem bijna knock-out.
translations.hi: गेंद ने उसे लगभग बेहोश कर दिया.
translations.el: Η μπάλα σχεδόν τον έβγαλε νοκ άουτ.
translations.ja: ボールが彼をもう少しで気絶させるところだった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, modifies 'ballon' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of the verb.

Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'ballon'); transitive. The attached clitic 'l'' is the 3rd person singular direct object pronoun (lemma: 'le' or 'la'), gender unspecified by form.
Adverb of degree modifying the verb phrase, indicating approximation.

translations.en: You bore me to death with your jokes.
translations.es: Tus chistes me matan de aburrimiento.
translations.de: Deine Witze langweilen mich zu Tode.
translations.it: Le tue battute mi annoiano da morire.
translations.ko: 네 농담은 정말 지루해서 못 견디겠다.
translations.ru: Твои шутки меня до смерти утомляют.
translations.pt: As tuas piadas aborrecem-me até à morte.
translations.vi: Những trò đùa của bạn làm tôi chán muốn chết.
translations.uk: Твої жарти мене до смерті нудять.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे चुटकुले मुझे बुरी तरह उबा देते हैं.
translations.pl: Twoje żarty nudzą mnie na śmierć.
translations.el: Τα αστεία σου με κουράζουν μέχρι θανάτου.
translations.nb: Vitsene dine kjeder meg i hjel.
translations.id: Leluconmu membuat saya bosan setengah mati.
translations.sv: Dina skämt tråkar ut mig till döds.
translations.ro: Glumele tale mă plictisesc de moarte.
translations.cs: Tvé vtipy mě nudí k smrti.
translations.ja: 君の冗談は死ぬほど退屈だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular (agreeing with 'tu'); transitive. The attached clitic 'm'' is the 1st person singular direct object pronoun (lemma: 'me').
Preposition introducing the oblique complement 'tes blagues'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; plural form agreeing with 'blagues'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Ce discours risque d'assommer tout le monde.

translations.fr: Ce discours risque d'assommer tout le monde.
translations.en: This talk might bore everyone to death.
translations.es: Este discurso podría aburrir a todo el mundo hasta la muerte.
translations.de: Diese Rede könnte alle zu Tode langweilen.
translations.it: Questo discorso rischia di annoiare tutti a morte.
translations.ko: 이 연설은 모두를 지루해 죽게 만들 수도 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这场演讲可能会让所有人昏昏欲睡。
translations.yue: 呢場演講可能會悶死晒所有人。
translations.ru: Эта речь может утомить всех до смерти.
translations.pt: Este discurso pode aborrecer toda a gente até à morte.
translations.he: הנאום הזה עלול לשעמם את כולם עד מוות.
translations.vi: Bài nói này có thể làm mọi người chán muốn chết.
translations.ar: قد يُمِلُّ هذا الخطاب الجميع حتى الموت.
translations.nl: Deze toespraak kan iedereen dood vervelen.
translations.uk: Ця промова може знудити всіх до смерті.
translations.hu: Ez a beszéd mindenkit halálra untathat.
translations.hi: यह भाषण सबको बोरियत से मार सकता है.
translations.pl: To przemówienie může zanudzić wszystkich na śmierć.
translations.el: Αυτή η ομιλία μπορεί να κουράσει τους πάντες μέχρι θανάτου.
translations.nb: Denne talen kan kjede alle i hjel.
translations.id: Pidato ini bisa membuat semua orang bosan setengah mati.
translations.sv: Det här talet kan tråka ut alla till döds.
translations.ro: Discursul ăsta i-ar putea plictisi pe toți de moarte.
translations.cs: Tato řeč může všechny unudit k smrti.
translations.da: Denne tale kan kede alle ihjel.
translations.fi: Tämä puhe saattaa pitkästyttää kaikki kuoliaiksi.
translations.ja: この講演はみんなを死ぬほど退屈させるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'discours' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of 'risque'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the infinitival complement introduced by 'de'.
Infinitive verb; preceded by elided preposition 'de' ('d''), forming the complement 'risquer de + infinitif'.
Determiner meaning 'all'; in the idiomatic NP 'tout le monde' meaning 'everyone', modifies 'monde'.
Definite article, masculine singular, part of the NP 'le monde'.
Common noun, masculine singular; in 'tout le monde' functions idiomatically as 'everyone'.
